title: Microsoft Patch Tuesday security updates for March 2026 fixed 84 bugs

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Microsoft Patch Tuesday security updates for March 2026 fixe
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/11
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*network.zh-tw.tenable*'
            - '*server.isc.sans*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
